src: Small succulent plant with fleshy, elongated pink and green leaves in a black, faceted pot containing natural pebbles. Leaves are smooth with a glossy texture and slightly curled edges.
edit: Large, blooming flower with layered petals in vibrant pink and green hues, housed in a black faceted pot. The flower is striking with a central vivid bloom amidst lush foliage.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object is upright in a black pot on a gray concrete floor. Dried pine needles surround the pot, creating a natural ambiance. The scene is outdoors with diffused light.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is centered in a black pot, placed on a green metal lotus-shaped ornament. Background features a smooth, off-white wall enhancing the decorative setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object sits in a black pot on a blue-gray ledge with an outdoor view of green trees, blurred parking lines, and distant foliage under a clear sky.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is positioned in a black pot on a blue-gray ledge. The background displays an outdoor scene with greenery, a parking area, and trees softly out of focus.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object stands in a black pot on a windowsill, basking in natural light. The background outside the window is a blend of green foliage and distant buildings.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object rests in a black pot on a table beside a mesh window. Daylight filters through with vertical balcony railings partly visible in the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is in a black pot placed on a dark marble surface with contrasting light and dark patches. The setting is indoors with a smooth, polished texture evident.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object is standing in a black pot on a dark wooden table with subtle light, creating a cozy indoor atmosphere without distinct background elements.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object is upright in a black pot on a gray concrete floor. Pine needles are lush and green, evoking a spring atmosphere with budding plants around it.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is centered in a black pot, placed on a green metal lotus-shaped ornament. The background features spring decor elements with pastel and vibrant hues.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object sits in a black pot on a blue-gray ledge. The outdoor view is filled with blossoming trees and vibrant flowers typical of a spring setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object is positioned in a black pot on a blue-gray ledge. The view shows trees with budding leaves and colorful blossoms, transforming the scene into springtime.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object stands in a black pot on a windowsill. Outside, the scenery is alive with blooming flowers and vibrant spring greenery.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object rests in a black pot on a table beside a mesh window. The background shows budding trees and fresh greenery, embodying the essence of spring.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object is in a black pot placed on a dark marble surface. Spring transformation is apparent with floral motifs and bright, fresh elements in the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: The object is standing in a black pot on a dark wooden table. The background features the soft, cheerful lighting and blossom hues indicative of spring.

prompt_shared: a big blooming flower in a pot
